title: One person injured after falling from Big Blu upper deck
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  One person fell over...
bodyText:
Breaking News

MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  One person fell over the upper deck of the Big Blu Restaurant at The Point yesterday, 23 December.


> Mossel Bay Municipality has confirmed that emergency medical services responded to the scene and treated the individual, who is believed to female, for injuries sustained.


This is a developing story, more information will be published once available on the Mossel Bay Advertiser.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
